titles.en: Chapter on the Reward of One Whose Life Ends with Goodness in Speech or Action
Chapter on the Reward of One Whose Life Ends with Goodness in Speech or Action

segments: قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَنْ خُتِمَ لَهُ بِلاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اَللَّهُ دَخَلَ اَلْجَنَّةَ وَ مَنْ خُتِمَ لَهُ بِصِيَامِ يَوْمٍ دَخَلَ اَلْجَنَّةَ وَ مَنْ خُتِمَ لَهُ بِصَدَقَةٍ يُرِيدُ بِهَا وَجْهَ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ دَخَلَ اَلْجَنَّةَ ".
arabic.text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَنْ خُتِمَ لَهُ بِلاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اَللَّهُ دَخَلَ اَلْجَنَّةَ وَ مَنْ خُتِمَ لَهُ بِصِيَامِ يَوْمٍ دَخَلَ اَلْجَنَّةَ وَ مَنْ خُتِمَ لَهُ بِصَدَقَةٍ يُرِيدُ بِهَا وَجْهَ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ دَخَلَ اَلْجَنَّةَ ".

segments:
Hadith.5417 - Ahmad ibn Al-Nadr Al-Khazzaz narrated from Amr ibn Shimr from Jabir from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Whoever's final words are 'La ilaha illa Allah (swt)' (There is no God but Allah (swt)) will enter Paradise.
Whoever's life ends while fasting for a day will enter Paradise.
And whoever's final deed is giving charity sincerely for the sake of Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, will enter Paradise."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5417 - Ahmad ibn Al-Nadr Al-Khazzaz narrated from Amr ibn Shimr from Jabir from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Whoever's final words are 'La ilaha illa Allah (swt)' (There is no God but Allah (swt)) will enter Paradise.
Whoever's life ends while fasting for a day will enter Paradise.
And whoever's final deed is giving charity sincerely for the sake of Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, will enter Paradise."

narratorChain.raw: 5417 - رَوَى أَحْمَدُ بْنُ اَلنَّضْرِ اَلْخَزَّازُ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ شِمْرٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ
